title: Pregnancy Due Date Calculator
description: Industrial-grade calculator for estimating the expected due date (EDD) based on last menstrual period (LMP) and cycle variability, incorporating lean and six-sigma principles for process control and risk assessment.

inputs.label: Last Menstrual Period (LMP) Date
inputs.businessContext: Date of the first day of the last menstrual period, used as the baseline for gestational age calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Date of the first day of the last menstrual period, used as the baseline for gestational age calculation.

inputs.label: Average Cycle Length
inputs.businessContext: Average length of the woman's menstrual cycle in days. Deviations from 28 days adjust the due date estimate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average length of the woman's menstrual cycle in days. Deviations from 28 days adjust the due date estimate.

inputs.label: Luteal Phase Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the luteal phase (post-ovulation). Typically 14 days, but can vary. Used to refine ovulation date.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of the luteal phase (post-ovulation). Typically 14 days, but can vary. Used to refine ovulation date.

inputs.label: Ultrasound Gestational Age (weeks)
inputs.businessContext: Gestational age measured by ultrasound (crown-rump length). If provided, overrides LMP-based estimate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gestational age measured by ultrasound (crown-rump length). If provided, overrides LMP-based estimate.

inputs.label: Ultrasound Gestational Age (additional days)
inputs.businessContext: Remaining days beyond weeks for ultrasound gestational age.

businessContext_i18n.en: Remaining days beyond weeks for ultrasound gestational age.

inputs.label: Cycle Variability (standard deviation)
inputs.businessContext: Standard deviation of cycle length, used to compute confidence intervals and data confidence adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard deviation of cycle length, used to compute confidence intervals and data confidence adjustment.

inputs.label: Parity (number of previous births)
inputs.businessContext: Number of previous live births. Used in risk stratification (e.g., grand multiparity).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of previous live births. Used in risk stratification (e.g., grand multiparity).

inputs.label: Risk Factors Present
inputs.businessContext: Presence of known risk factors that may affect due date reliability or require additional monitoring.

businessContext_i18n.en: Presence of known risk factors that may affect due date reliability or require additional monitoring.

rules.condition: ultrasound_ga_weeks is null AND lmp_date is null
rules.message: Either LMP date or ultrasound gestational age must be provided.
Cycle length must be between 21 and 45 days.
Luteal phase length must be between 10 and 17 days.

rules.condition: ultrasound_ga_weeks is not null AND (ultrasound_ga_weeks < 5 OR ultrasound_ga_weeks > 42)
rules.message: Ultrasound gestational age must be between 5 and 42 weeks.
Ultrasound additional days must be between 0 and 6.

thresholds.alert: Grand multiparity detected. Consider enhanced monitoring.
Risk factor present: {risk_factors}. Adjust care plan accordingly.
High cycle variability reduces due date confidence. Recommend ultrasound confirmation.

thresholds.condition: ultrasound_ga_weeks is not null AND lmp_date is not null AND abs(ultrasound_ga_weeks - lmp_ga_weeks) > 2
thresholds.alert: Discrepancy >2 weeks between LMP and ultrasound. Reconcile dating.

formulas.description: Calculate gestational age in days from LMP to current date (assumed as today for due date calculation).
Adjust ovulation day based on cycle length and luteal phase.
Estimated due date using Naegele's rule adjusted for cycle length.
Estimated due date from ultrasound gestational age.
Primary due date: use ultrasound if available, else LMP-based.
formulas.formula: edd_primary = (ultrasound_ga_weeks is not null) ? edd_ultrasound : edd_lmp

formulas.description: Gestational age at the primary due date (should be 40 weeks).
Calculate 95% confidence interval for due date based on cycle variability.

primary.label: Estimated Due Date (EDD)
primary.description: Primary estimated due date based on best available data.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Cycle Variability Impact
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Uncertainty in cycle length reduces precision of LMP-based due date.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Luteal Phase Variation
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Deviations from typical 14-day luteal phase shift ovulation date.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Ultrasound Timing Error
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Ultrasound dating accuracy decreases after 20 weeks.

suggestedActions.label: Reconcile LMP and ultrasound dates if discrepancy > 2 weeks
Encourage cycle tracking for future cycle variability reduction

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Score
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Confidence in the due date estimate based on input quality and variability.
